faqs.q: Can high creatinine always be reduced?
faqs.a: It depends on the underlying cause. A doctor reviews your reports, history and medications to plan care. We do not promise guaranteed outcomes.

faqs.q: Do you guarantee that dialysis can be stopped?
faqs.a: No. We never make such claims. Dialysis decisions are strictly doctor- and report-led, based on your kidney function.

faqs.q: Is the first consultation online or in clinic?
faqs.a: You choose — video, phone, or an in-clinic visit. Reports can be shared securely before your appointment.

faqs.q: Is the Ayurveda support safe with my medicines?
faqs.a: Lifestyle and dietary support is given alongside, and in coordination with, your medical treatment — never as a replacement for it.

faqs.q: How quickly will someone contact me?
faqs.a: Our care team usually responds the same day during working hours. This is not an emergency service.
